justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified the date and time preferences, even when the user initially omitted the year.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent offered alternative dates when the preferred slot was unavailable and successfully booked the user's chosen alternative.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent repeated the phrase "Perfect, 'Online Meeting' is available for Investing consultations" in turn 2, which was unnecessary.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was generally smooth and professional, with the agent successfully booking the appointment despite initial unavailability.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well by offering alternative dates and times when the initial request was unavailable, maintaining context throughout the conversation.
